CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(TEXT(Supplier_pre_2__c)), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(Support_Description__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(Support_Expiration__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(Support_Fee__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(TEXT(Support_Fee_Frequency__c)), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(TEXT(Territory_DX__c)), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(Territory_Viacord__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(Unique_Provider_ID__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(Viacord_Enroll_Month12__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(Viacord_Enroll_Month4__c), 1, 0) /* + IF(ISBLANK(ZOOM__ZI_Company__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(ZOOM__ZI_Company2__c), 1, 0) + IF(ISBLANK(ZOOM__ZI_ImportedDate__c), 1, 0) */
CustomField.label: No of Empty Fields 5 (Custom)
